series_metadata.series_title: APPLICATION FOR VENDORS LICENSE TO MAKE TAXBLE SALES
series_metadata.series_description: Application for vendors license to make taxable sales and collect sales tax.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Original applications are retained for one month, imaged (.pdf), then shred. ; Microform: 35 years then shred. ; Electronic: 35 years then erased, Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
